name: Mage Ai
tagline: Build, run, and manage data pipelines for integrating and transforming data.
description:
Build, run, and manage data pipelines for integrating and transforming data.

Docs: https://docs.mage.ai?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  mage-ai:
    image: mageai/mageai:0.9.78
    command: mage start default_project
    environment:
      - PROJECT_NAME=default_project
      - USER_CODE_PATH=/home/src/default_project
      - ENV=production
    volumes:
      - mageai_data:/home/src/
    restart: unless-stopped
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -s
        - -f
        - -o
        - /dev/null
        - http://127.0.0.1:6789
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
    ports:
      - 42062:6789
volumes:
  mageai_data: null
